question: 按月份统计销售总额，并计算环比增长率
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,7)) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY period

question: 各月份销售额同比去年的增长率
sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,4) AS year, substr(order_date,6,2) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY substr(order_date,1,4), substr(order_date,6,2)) SELECT year, month, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY year), 4) AS growth_rate FROM monthly ORDER BY month, year

question: 各商品品类的销售额占比
sql: SELECT categories.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.subtotal) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN categories ON spus.category_id = categories.category_id GROUP BY categories.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 销量排名前10的品牌
sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT brands.name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN spus ON skus.spu_id = spus.spu_id JOIN brands ON spus.brand_id = brands.brand_id GROUP BY brands.name) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 销量最高的10个商品
sql: SELECT dimension_value, metric_value FROM (SELECT skus.sku_name AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.quantity) AS metric_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(order_items.quantity) DESC) AS rn FROM order_items JOIN skus ON order_items.sku_id = skus.sku_id GROUP BY skus.sku_id, skus.sku_name) ranked WHERE rn <= 10 ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 各支付方式的成功交易金额分布
sql: SELECT method AS dimension_value, SUM(amount) AS metric_value FROM payments WHERE status = 'success' GROUP BY method ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 整体退货率是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM return_orders) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders), 4) AS metric_value

question: 各退货原因的分布占比
sql: SELECT reason AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM return_orders GROUP BY reason ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 优惠券整体核销率
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'used' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM user_coupons

question: 不同会员等级的消费总额
sql: SELECT membership_levels.name AS dimension_value, SUM(orders.total_amount) AS metric_value FROM membership_levels JOIN users ON users.level_id = membership_levels.level_id JOIN orders ON orders.user_id = users.user_id GROUP BY membership_levels.level_id, membership_levels.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 浏览、加购、下单各环节的用户数转化漏斗
sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'view') AS view_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_events WHERE event_type = 'add_cart') AS add_cart_users, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders) AS order_users

question: 展示商品类目的完整层级路径
sql: WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS (SELECT category_id, name, parent_id, level, CAST(name AS TEXT) AS path FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.category_id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.level, category_tree.path || ' > ' || c.name FROM categories c JOIN category_tree ON c.parent_id = category_tree.category_id) SELECT category_id, name, level, path FROM category_tree ORDER BY path

question: 查询员工的上下级组织层级路径
sql: WITH RECURSIVE org AS (SELECT employee_id, employee_name, manager_id, 1 AS depth, CAST(employee_name AS TEXT) AS path FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_name, e.manager_id, org.depth + 1, org.path || ' > ' || e.employee_name FROM employees e JOIN org ON e.manager_id = org.employee_id) SELECT employee_id, employee_name, depth, path FROM org ORDER BY path

question: 各物流公司的平均配送时长（天）
sql: SELECT logistics_companies.name AS dimension_value, ROUND(AVG(julianday(shipments.delivered_at) - julianday(shipments.shipped_at)), 2) AS metric_value FROM shipments JOIN logistics_companies ON shipments.company_id = logistics_companies.company_id WHERE shipments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL AND shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_companies.company_id, logistics_companies.name ORDER BY metric_value

question: 商品评价的评分分布
sql: SELECT rating AS dimension_value, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating

question: 商品好评率（评分4分及以上占比）
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS metric_value FROM product_reviews

question: 平均客单价
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS metric_value FROM orders

question: 用户复购率（下单2次及以上的用户占比）
sql: SELECT ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) AS repeat_users) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders), 4) AS metric_value

question: 各仓库的出库总量
sql: SELECT warehouses.name AS dimension_value, SUM(CASE WHEN inventory_movements.movement_type = 'outbound' THEN inventory_movements.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS metric_value FROM inventory_movements JOIN warehouses ON inventory_movements.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id GROUP BY warehouses.warehouse_id, warehouses.name ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 库存低于安全库存需要补货的商品
sql: SELECT skus.sku_name, warehouses.name AS warehouse, inventory.quantity, inventory.safety_stock FROM inventory JOIN skus ON inventory.sku_id = skus.sku_id JOIN warehouses ON inventory.warehouse_id = warehouses.warehouse_id WHERE inventory.quantity < inventory.safety_stock ORDER BY inventory.quantity

question: 各省份的销售额分布
sql: SELECT receiver_province AS dimension_value, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders WHERE receiver_province IS NOT NULL GROUP BY receiver_province ORDER BY metric_value DESC
